raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tee Preesterxi / un tee Praweeschi/ un tee Laudis dsir-
deja/ ka Jeremijus tchohs Wahr-
dus Deewa Namma runnaja.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Kad Jeremijus bij pabei-
dsıs wiffu runnaht / fo tas KUNGS bij pawehlejs us wif-
teem Laudun runnaht / tad fa-
grahbe wixxu tee Breesterxi/ un
tee Praweeschi/ un wiffi Laud-
dis/ un faztija: Teeschaim / tew
buhs mirt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Kapehz drihkti tu eeksch ta
KUNGA Wahrda fluddinaht /
un fazziht: Schis Nains buhs
ta ka Sihlus/ tchis Pilsjahts
buhs pohsta/ ka neweens tur
dsihwo? Un wifti Laudis tapul-
zejahs prett Jeremiju eeksch ta
KUNGA Namma.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Kad nu tee Leel-Kungi no
Juha fchohs Wahrdus dsirde-
ja / gahje tee augfcham no ta
Kehnixa Namma uhs ta KUN-
GA Namnu/ un apfehdahs
preeksch ta KUNGA jauno
Wahrtu Durwim.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad runnaja tee Preeste-
xi/ un tee Praweeschi us teem
Leel-Kungeem/ un us wiffeem
Laudin / un faztija : Schis
Wihrs irr to Nahwi pelnijs/ jo
winsch irr prett tcho Pilsfachtu
fluddinajs / ka juhs ar juhsahm
Ausfin effat dsirdejschi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet Jeremijus runnaja
us wiffeem Leeleem-Kungeem/ un
us wiffeem Laudun / un faztija:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "tas KUNGS irr mannt juh-
tijs fluddinaht prett scho (Dee-
wa) Nammu/ un prett scho
Pilsfahtu wiffus Wahrdus/ fo
juhs effat dsirdejschi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Nu tad/ darrajt juhfus
Zeltus/ un juhfus Daebns pa-
reisus/ un paklaufsajt ta KUN-
GA juhsfu Deewa Balksnei/ tad
buhs tam KUNGAM tas Lau-
nums schehl / fo winsch prett
jums bij runnajs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet es/ raugi/ es etmu
juhtas Rohkas/ darrajt man/
ka jums pascheem labbi patthk.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet tomehr sinnajt/ kad
juhs manni nokanfeet/ tad krah-
feet juhs us jums nenoseedsigu
Affini/ un pahr scho Pilsfahtu/
un pahr wixxu Eedsihwotajeem/
jo tas KUNGS irr manni pa-
teesi pee jums fuhtijs / wiffus
schohs Wahrdus preeksch juh-
fahm Ausfin runnaht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad faztija tee Leeli-
Kungi/ un wiffi Laudis us teem
Preestereem/ un us teem Pra-
weescheem : Pee Scha Wihra ne
irr Nahweg Waina/jo winsch irr
us mumbs runnajs eeksch ta
Wahrda ta KUNGA muhsfu
Deewa.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ir zitti Wihti no teem
Wezzajeem tahs Semnes zeh-
lahs / un runnaja uhs wiffu
Lauschu Draudsi/ un faztija:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Mikus tas Maresiteris
irr eeksch tahm Deenahm Iski-
jus/ ta Kehnixa no Juha flud-
dinajs/ un us wiffeem Laudun
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
